memory_entries.text: In jazzband/tablib, XLSX import code is in src/tablib/formats/_xlsx.py. import_book already pads short ragged rows to data.width before append; import_set needed analogous padding before dset.append to avoid InvalidDimensions for Google Docs XLSX exports with omitted trailing empty cells. XLSX tests class is XLSXTests in tests/test_tablib.py; full suite command python -m pytest -q passed.
